zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Rushton於1489年出生在英國斯塔福爾利可時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Rishton44歲，母親Margaret Radcliffe36歲。她於1502年與Hugh Stoddard結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1556年在她的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 波斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Rushton于1489年出生在英国斯塔福爾利可时，她的父亲Sir Nicholas Rishton44岁，母亲Margaret Radcliffe36岁。她于1502年与Hugh Stoddard结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1556年在她的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rushton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Rishton (Lancashire) and Rushton (Staffordshire), and perhaps also from Rushton (Cheshire, Northamptonshire), Rushton in East Stoke (Dorset), and Rhiston (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English risc ‘rush’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Rustin
meanings: habitational name from Ruston Parva (East Yorkshire), Ruston in Wykeham (North Yorkshire), Ruston (Norfolk), or Ruston in East Worlington (Devon). The East Yorkshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Róarr (genitive Róars), or perhaps the Old English personal name Hrōr (genitive Hrōres), + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The North Yorkshire placename may derive from Old English hrōst ‘roof beam, rafter’, perhaps referring to a wood where rafters were collected, + tūn. The Norfolk placename derives from Old English hrīs ‘brushwood’ + tūn. The Devon placename appears to derive from an Old English personal name Hringstān (genitive Hringstānes) + Old English dūn ‘hill’.

variants.name: Rushin
meanings: English: variant of   Rushton  . See also   Rushing   and 2 below.
Variant of   Rushing  , a surname of German or perhaps English origin.
Americanized form of Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Rušin or Rušín (see Rusin ).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Rushton was born in 1489, in Leek, Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir Nicholas Rishton, was 44 and her mother, Margaret Radcliffe, was 36. She married Hugh Stoddard in 1502. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1556, in her hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Rushton est née en 1489, à Leek, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Nicholas Rishton, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Radcliffe, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Stoddard en 1502. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1556, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Rushton 1489 in Leek, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas Rishton 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret Radcliffe 36. Sie hat 1502 Hugh Stoddard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1556 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Rushton è nata il nel 1489 nel Leek, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Nicholas Rishton, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margaret Radcliffe, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Stoddard nel 1502. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1556, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.Rushton Spencer, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアルシュトン スペンサー

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Rushtonが1489年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアリークで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Rishtonは44歳，母Margaret Radcliffeは36歳であった。1502年にHugh Stoddardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1556年に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Rushton(이)가 1489년 영국 스태퍼드실르 리크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Rishton(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Radcliffe(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1502년 Hugh Stoddard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Rushton nasceu em 1489, em Leek, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Rishton, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Radcliffe, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Stoddard em 1502. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1556, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Rushton родилась в 1489 г. в местности лик, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Rishton было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Radcliffe, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Stoddard в 1502 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1556 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Rushton nació en 1489, en Leek, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Nicholas Rishton, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Radcliffe, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Hugh Stoddard en 1502. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1556, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
